Organizational Behavior.question: What is the primary focus of Organizational Behavior?
options: The study of individual behavior within organizations
The study of organizational structure and design
The study of organizational culture and climate
The study of organizational change and development
Organizational Behavior.answer: The study of individual behavior within organizations

Definition.question: What is the definition of Organizational Behavior?
options: The study of how individuals and groups interact within organizations
The study of the structure and design of organizations
The study of the culture and climate of organizations
The study of the behavior of individuals within organizations
Definition.answer: The study of how individuals and groups interact within organizations

Need and Importance of Organizational Be.question: Why is Organizational Behavior important?
options: To understand organizational structure and design
To improve organizational culture and climate
To enhance individual and group performance
To increase organizational effectiveness
Need and Importance of Organizational Be.answer: To enhance individual and group performance

Nature and Scope of Organizational Behav.question: What is the scope of Organizational Behavior?
options: It studies only individual behavior within organizations
It studies only organizational culture and climate
It studies the interaction between individuals and groups within organizations
It studies the behavior of organizations as a whole
Nature and Scope of Organizational Behav.answer: It studies the interaction between individuals and groups within organizations

options: A set of principles and concepts that guide the study of organizational behavior
A set of theories and models that explain organizational behavior
A set of practices and techniques that improve organizational performance
A set of tools and methods that analyze organizational data
Framework.answer: A set of principles and concepts that guide the study of organizational behavior
